recent_trades.summary: Increasing AMD to 5% on +3.4% outperformance, highest sentiment of +0.46, and direct inclusion in positive AI data-center capex headlines, confidence 8/10.

Position sizing uses freed cash from MSFT trim plus existing cash to reach a still-conservative 5% weight.

A 4% starter position is appropriate this late in the session because momentum is favorable, but the stock is extended enough that sizing should remain moderate until we see whether the breakout holds.
